text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Even when I change the data, I get the same
result...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Whew... I really need to leave early and lie down
today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Wait. There's still something I haven't tried yet.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So, I just need to roll the code back, then comb
through it line-by-line...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Besides, doubt I'll be able to sleep if I don't finish.
Let's see the job done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, once again, Air Shakur fails to get a
proper sleep.
